call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search
call_chain.notes: Entry point; dispatches to search_reader, search_preprocessor, search_decompress, or search_path depending on haystack type

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_reader (method)
call_chain.notes: Matches on PatternMatcher variant (RustRegex/PCRE2), delegates to free fn search_reader

call_chain.name: search_reader (free fn)
call_chain.notes: Dispatch point: matches on Printer enum variant, calls p.sink_with_path() to instantiate StandardSink, SummarySink, or JSONSink, then calls Searcher::search_reader

call_chain.name: Searcher::search_reader
call_chain.notes: Public API on grep::searcher::Searcher; generic over M: Matcher, R: io::Read, S: Sink

change_impact_map.change: Create CSV<W> printer struct, CSVSink<'p,'s,M,W>, and impl Sink for CSVSink with matched_*, begin, finish methods writing RFC 4180 rows
Add `mod csv;` and re-export CSV, CSVSink, CSVBuilder
Add CSV(grep::printer::CSV<W>) variant to the Printer<W> enum
Add match arm for Printer::CSV in free fn search_path, instantiating CSVSink via p.sink_with_path()
Add match arm for Printer::CSV in free fn search_reader, instantiating CSVSink via p.sink_with_path()
Add CSV case in SearchWorkerBuilder when configured output format is CSV, constructing grep::printer::CSV<W>
Extend --format flag to accept `csv` as a valid value and map it to Printer::CSV at construction time
